description_long: This rifle features a rugged, industrial design with a weathered yellow and black finish, accented by red and metallic components. The main body is robust, with a large cylindrical drum magazine mounted beneath the receiver, suggesting high ammunition capacity. The grip and foregrip are ergonomically shaped, with the foregrip painted red and appearing slightly worn. The barrel is short and thick, with a squared-off muzzle and a visible top rail, possibly for mounting additional optics. A boxy sighting device is mounted on top, and the overall construction appears to be primarily metal with some polymer or plastic elements. The rifle's surface is heavily scratched and chipped, indicating extensive use or exposure to harsh environments.
description: A rugged, yellow-and-black rifle with a large drum magazine, red foregrip, and a boxy top-mounted sight. The surface is heavily worn, giving it an industrial, battle-worn appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the yellow receiver, large drum magazine, red foregrip, and boxy sight on top.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the thick, squared-off barrel, dual drum magazines, and the alignment of the sight and foregrip.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same drum magazine, yellow receiver, and red foregrip, with more visible wear and scratches.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the back of the receiver, the top-mounted sight, and the symmetry of the dual drum magazines.
